description: Logicle transformation of (selected) parameters in a list mode FCS data file.
author: Josef Spidlen, BC Cancer Agency
plan:
## LogicleTransformFCS GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
LogicleTransformFCS is a GenePattern module that Logicle transformation of (selected) parameters in a list mode FCS data file.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 8 parameters:
- Required: Input.fcs.data.file, Use.Fast.Implementation, Output.fcs.file.name
- Optional: Parameters.to.transform, T, M, W, A

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -jar <libdir>logicletransform.jar <Input.fcs.data.file> <Output.fcs.file.name> <Parameters.to.transform> <T> <M> <W> <A> <Use.Fast.Implementation>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Parameters.to.transform
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of parameters to transform, parameters are specified by their short names ($PnN values); Optional. By default, all parameters with the "FL" prefix in their short name will be transformed.

parameters.name: T
parameters.description: T > 0; Data value at the top of the scale range to be displayed, optional. The maximum input value will be used if no explicit value for T is provided.

parameters.name: M
parameters.description: M < 0; Full width of the intended Logicle display in asymptotic decades, optional. The default value is 4.5 (decades). Note also that for the resulting Logicle transformation, Logicle (T) \= M.

parameters.name: W
parameters.description: W >\= 0; Linearization width in asymptotic decades; optional. The described calculation will be used to set W for each of the transformed FCS parameters if no explicit value for W is provided.

parameters.name: A
parameters.description: A, usually <\= 0; Additional negative display range in asymptotic decades; optional. The default value is 0.

parameters.name: Use.Fast.Implementation
parameters.description: Use a fast implementation of Logicle with less precision; optional.
